reviews.review_title: ok but more a phone app
reviews.review_description:
▪ It's ok to play and I didn't see any bugs
▪ But the problem is that it's more a phone app, so you do the same thing again and again : buy rooms, improve rooms, buy toilets, hire people for toilets and cleaning, improve their speed, take the money walking everywhere again and again
And then you unlock a new area : buy new rooms, improve... again and again and again : nothing more

▪ So I'm ok to play it in VR (even if it would be better in MR for that)
But it lacks content and surprise and skill or thinking
▪ No simulation or strategy or special interest of evolution : it's 100% farming , to pass time, and you may like that with a phone in a queue, but who really wants to put a headset to do this and spent so much time for nothing more?
👉 metaquest . forumactif . com 👈
